title: Fox Trot Brew
description: Let the sake fox do the grape-stomping for you — brewing has never been so graceful.
body:
Added a new task for the maid, allowing her to go to the fruit platter at Kaleidoscope Tavern to stomp juice.

If the maid has an empty bucket in her inventory, she can automatically obtain a juice bucket.

\=========================================

为女仆添加了一个新的任务，让女仆可以去 森罗物语：酒馆的 果盆，去踩果汁。

当女仆背包里有空桶，则可以自动获取 果汁桶。
